title: Fix struct literal on pattern assignment (#5552)

features.name: struct literal pattern assignment with typedef
features.description: Code should include a struct literal pattern assignment where a struct literal (using '{} syntax) is assigned to a pattern pin with an explicit typedef type from a package

features.name: pattern assignment with childDTypep from parameter
features.description: Code should include a pattern assignment where the pattern's childDTypep is derived from a parameter type rather than being explicitly specified in the RTL code
